ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "test_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard associated with the test method (e.g., AASHTO T11) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test method was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test method was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test method */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test method */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the test method is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method being certified */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the certification (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "ia_responsible_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IA responsible personnel */,
  "lab_scope" INTEGER /* Whether the certification is within the scope of the laboratory */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the certification */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the certification */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory associated with the certification */,
  "scope_change_date" TEXT /* Date the scope of the certification was last changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_ia_responsible_id FOREIGN KEY ("ia_responsible_id") REFERENCES ia_responsible_personnel ("ia_responsible_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("test_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ia_responsible_personnel" (
  "ia_responsible_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IA responsible personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the IA responsible personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the IA responsible personnel */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the IA responsible personnel belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the IA responsible personnel record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the IA responsible personnel record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the IA responsible personnel record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the IA responsible personnel record */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the IA responsible personnel */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the IA responsible personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ia_responsible_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the laboratory */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the laboratory record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the laboratory record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the laboratory record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the laboratory record */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the laboratory */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_scope" (
  "lab_scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory scope */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method */,
  "within_scope" INTEGER /* Whether the test method is within the scope of the laboratory */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the lab scope record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the lab scope record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the lab scope record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the lab scope record */,
  "scope_change_date" TEXT /* Date the scope was last changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_scope_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("test_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_scope_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the standard was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the standard was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the standard */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the standard */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the standard is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the personnel */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the personnel belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the personnel record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the personnel record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the personnel record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the personnel record */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the personnel */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_personnel" (
  "lab_personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory personnel */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personnel */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the lab personnel record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the lab personnel record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the lab personnel record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the lab personnel record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel in the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_method_versions" (
  "test_method_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method version */,
  "test_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the test method */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the test method version becomes effective */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test method version was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test method version was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test method version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test method version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_method_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_method_versions_test_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("test_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_versions" (
  "standard_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard version */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the standard version becomes effective */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the standard version was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the standard version was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the standard version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the standard version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standard_versions_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certification_reports" (
  "certification_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification report */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the certification report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the certification report was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the certification report */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the certification report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the certification report (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certification_reports_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Action taken during the audit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the audit trail record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the audit trail record was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the audit trail record */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the audit trail record */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)
